name: Spector Girl Groups
description: The Phil Spector girl-group signature: a I-vi-IV-V doo-wop hook plus a cycle-of-fifths secondary-dominant bridge (III7-VI7-II7-V7). Distilled from Ronettes, Crystals and Darlene Love sides.
source: Ultimate Guitar chord sheets, 8-song Phil Spector girl-group aggregate
